diagnoses.root_cause: Old substrate API incompatibility (March 2026). Uses deprecated CausalGridWorld (not V2) with custom 3x3 observation subclass. SD-003 z_world counterfactual approach tested here is obsolete: EXQ-030b PASS validated the z_world architecture, then SD-003 was redesigned to use z_harm_s pipeline (ARC-033, E2HarmSForward). No error message captured.
diagnoses.claim_ids_rationale: SD-003 z_world counterfactual variant is superseded. Current SD-003 evidence path is EXQ-329/330a/353 using z_harm_s forward model (ARC-033). No new experiment needed for this specific design.
diagnoses.disposition: SKIP - claim superseded. SD-003 z_world counterfactual validated by EXQ-030b PASS; redesigned to z_harm_s pipeline (ARC-033). No fix script needed.

diagnoses.root_cause: Old substrate API incompatibility (March 2026). Specific error not captured in runner_status or per-machine files. Likely cause: update_running_variance(), SelectionResult.committed, or related E3 methods did not exist in the early March substrate. Script now runs cleanly on current substrate (confirmed by smoke test 2026-04-13).
diagnoses.fix_applied: New EXQ ID (V3-EXQ-396) to avoid runner skip. Script content identical to EXQ-038; substrate is now compatible. All API calls verified against current ree_core: update_running_variance(), SelectionResult.committed, e3._running_variance direct assignment, generate_candidates_random() -- all present.
diagnoses.claim_ids_rationale: ARC-016 (dynamic precision tracks environment stability) is still v3_pending and this characterization sweep is the intended experimental evidence. MECH-093 (z_beta modulates heartbeat frequency, predicting precision boundary scales with danger) is a secondary claim tested by the quantitative sweep. Both are re-evaluated as appropriate: the experimental design directly measures precision scaling with hazard_harm levels, which is the core measurement for both claims.

draft_queue_entry.title: ARC-016 precision threshold sweep: hazard_harm 5-level characterization (EXQ-038 staged fix)
draft_queue_entry.notes: Staged fix. Original V3-EXQ-038 errored 2026-03-19 due to old substrate API incompatibility (no error message preserved). Script verified to run cleanly on current substrate. Full run: 300 train + 20 stable + 20 perturbed eval per hazard_harm level x5 levels.

diagnoses.root_cause: Old substrate API incompatibility (March 2026). Specific error not captured. V3-EXQ-046b is a re-queue attempt of the same script that also errored. Both share the same root cause. Script now runs cleanly on current substrate (confirmed by smoke test 2026-04-13). E3 tick properly triggered when e3_steps_per_tick=10 steps elapsed; terrain loss and hippo quality gap require 600+ episode full run.
diagnoses.fix_applied: New EXQ ID (V3-EXQ-397) covering both V3-EXQ-046 and V3-EXQ-046b. Script content identical to EXQ-046; substrate is now compatible. All API calls verified: agent.hippocampal._get_terrain_action_object_mean(), residue_field.evaluate_trajectory(), generate_candidates_random(), Trajectory.get_world_state_sequence() -- all present.
diagnoses.claim_ids_rationale: ARC-007 (path memory: hippocampal proposals navigate residue-field terrain) is the primary claim under test. SD-004 (action objects as hippocampal map backbone) was listed in original EXQ-046 claim_ids but ARC-007 is the testable hypothesis here: ablating the residue field should degrade hippocampal proposal quality if proposals rely on terrain geometry. SD-004 is an architectural prerequisite (already implemented) not the variable being measured. Removing SD-004 from claim_ids reduces erroneous governance weighting.

draft_queue_entry.title: ARC-007 path memory ablation: residue field zeroing degrades hippo proposals (EXQ-046b staged fix)
draft_queue_entry.notes: Staged fix. Original V3-EXQ-046 and V3-EXQ-046b both errored 2026-03-20/22 due to old substrate API incompatibility. Script verified to run cleanly on current substrate. Full run: 600 warmup + 50 intact eval + ablation + 50 ablated eval + 30 restore eval.

diagnoses.root_cause: Re-queue of V3-EXQ-046 under different ID after EXQ-046 errored. Same script, same root cause (old substrate API incompatibility). Covered by V3-EXQ-397 fix above.
diagnoses.fix_applied: Covered by V3-EXQ-397 which supersedes both V3-EXQ-046 and V3-EXQ-046b.
